jsonLd.title: Woodland is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Woodland in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Woodland:
Woodland is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Woodland!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
